common.tagline: AI that shields you from digital threats

hero.title: AI-powered protection against voice phishing

voicePhishing.title: Voice phishing detection

familyProtect.title: Protect your family
familyProtect.description: Set up protection remotely for your parents and grandparents, and monitor their safety.
